sectorId.description: Foreign key reference to parent sector

x.description: Hex column (1-32 in standard Traveller sector)

y.description: Hex row (1-40 in standard Traveller sector)

starCount.description: Number of stars in the system

age.description: Star age in billions of years

habitableZone.description: Distance from primary star where water-bearing worlds can exist (AU)

generatedSurvey.description: Full survey data persisted by the system generator, including world placement, star data, and computed profiles

iissProfile.description: IISS stellar profile string in Traveller 5 format (e.g., 'G2V-V-1-1-1-5:B-6-0.1-M5V-V-0.2-0.2-0.01')

planetarySystemProfile.description: Computed planetary system profiles used for quick system summary output

shortProfile.description: Short planetary profile in G-P-T-N-S format. G = gas giant count (eHex), P = planetoid belt count (eHex), T = terrestrial planet count (eHex), N = baseline number (placement index nearest habitable zone ≥ 0), S = system spread (rounded orbit-number increment between worlds)

longProfile.description: Long planetary profile in St-N-W...-S format, segmented by parent star. St = star designation (e.g., A, B, Cab), N = segment baseline (1-based index of world nearest habitable zone, or 0 if all worlds are outside HZ), W = world tokens in ascending orbit order (G=gas giant, P=planetoid belt, T=terrestrial, M=mainworld surface world, GM=gas giant hosting a mainworld moon, PM=planetoid belt hosting a mainworld moon), S = system spread. Multi-star segments separated by colons.

stars.description: Array of generated star objects with spectral, physical, and orbital data

planets.description: Array of generated planet/world placement objects

worldPlacement.description: Full world placement pipeline result including steps 1-10 counts, orbits, spread, and slot assignments

primaryGeneration.description: Primary star generation roll data and pipeline results
